issues.detail: The skill file does not cover error handling or edge cases in its instructions.
The skill file lacks concrete runnable code or procedures for the agent to execute.

scenarios.name: Draft a first Lovable prompt for a SaaS waitlist with referral leaderboard
scenarios.rationale: Treatment follows the skill's detailed-first-prompt guidance, requests shadcn/ui DataTable explicitly, asks for Supabase Auth + RLS policies and a referral_code/referred_by schema; baseline writes a vague feature list without leveraging Lovable's Supabase+shadcn defaults.

scenarios.name: Plan production handoff for a Lovable-generated app
scenarios.rationale: Treatment exports to GitHub, links the user's own Supabase project for production, reviews RLS policies before launch, and pairs with Cursor for business logic — all from the skill's Best Practices; baseline suggests generic deploy steps without Lovable-specific export/RLS review.
